meta.title: Nvidia RTX 5090 vs 4090, Project Digits & GB NVLink 72 at CES 2025
meta.description:

TIMESTAMPS:
00:00:00 - Introduction to Grace Blackwell NVLink 72 with 72 GPUs and 144 dies
00:00:28 - Details on memory configuration: 576 chips, 14 terabytes total
00:00:39 - Discussion of model sizes and Llama comparison
00:00:55 - B200 GPU specifications: 18 tops, 180GB memory
00:01:13 - Comparison with previous Hopper generation
00:01:37 - Discussion of 4-bit vs 8-bit operations
00:02:20 - NVIDIA's strategy regarding FP8 training and FP4 inference
00:02:43 - Analysis of O1 and O3 techniques impact
00:03:55 - Transition to RTX 50 series discussion
00:04:19 - Revenue comparison: Gaming vs Data Center
00:04:50 - RTX 50 series specifications revealed
00:06:27 - Pricing comparison with 4090 series
00:07:36 - Discussion of bandwidth limitations in inference
00:08:20 - Transformer integration in RTX graphics processing
00:09:06 - Introduction to Project Digits
00:09:39 - Project Digits specifications: 4TB storage, 128GB VRAM
00:10:46 - Memory bandwidth considerations for Project Digits
00:11:19 - Technical analysis of memory modules
00:12:13 - Conclusion of news update
